public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as district fixer.
manner: Thinks in wear, strain, and bottlenecks, treating neglect as a slow-moving threat. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a district fixer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of district fixer in and around Verdant Row District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Verdant Row District workable through the obligations of district fixer while managing the immediate pressure of economic fraud in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the underlying system working while everyone notices it only when stress, wear, or neglect begin to show. Around Verdant Row District, that usually means carrying economic fraud, design theft, route security without letting the role of district fixer visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Working with Faelar Bloomcrest can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Verdant Row District.
Faelar Bloomcrest can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Faelar Bloomcrest visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Verdant Row District, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Fashion Artisans Collective, Roadwarden command staff.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Verdant Row District: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
